RuleTextList[1]: The event consists of [Tainted Moonrise], [Grandiose Glamor], [Neon Dynamite], and [Dreamcatcher]. You can choose one from these three Coatings to research.
RuleTextList[2]: You may choose one of the Coatings to research. Once selected, it cannot be changed again.
RuleTextList[3]: All rewards are limited, and cannot be obtained again after drawing;\nyou will be guaranteed to obtain the selected Construct Coating once you complete [10x] research.
RuleTextList[4]: Each research needs to cost Research Items and the research cost increases\nCost per research as follows: 50/100/250/400/600/800/1200/1700/2200/2700
RuleTextList[5]: When there are not enough Research Items for research, you can use Black Cards or Rainbow Cards to exchange for them.\nBlack Card: Equivalent, Rainbow Card: Discount\nAfter the research event, the unused [Research Items] will be converted into Black Cards at a ratio of 1:1.
RuleTextList[6]: The probability of obtaining various rewards for each research is different, and there is a probability of obtaining the selected Coating from the starting of [5th] research;\nYou can go to [Drop Details] to check the probability
RuleTextList[7]: When the [8th] research is reached, you will obtain the extra reward of Coating Portrait].
